state.title: QCViz-MCP v3
state.chat_text:
Welcome to QCViz-MCP v3. I can run quantum
                    chemistry calculations using PySCF with Gemini AI planning.
                    Ask me to compute energies, optimize geometries, visualize
                    orbitals and ESP maps. Supports Korean input and ion pairs.

messages.text:
Welcome to QCViz-MCP v3. I can run quantum
                    chemistry calculations using PySCF with Gemini AI planning.
                    Ask me to compute energies, optimize geometries, visualize
                    orbitals and ESP maps. Supports Korean input and ion pairs.

payload.text: [viewer.js] _doUpdate вҖ” viz keys: xyz, molecule_xyz, esp, available, xyz_block
[viewer.js] addSurface вҖ” no surface to add for mode: orbital available: {"orbital":false,"density":false,"esp":true}
[chat.js] appendMessage вҖ” role: user text length: 16 extra: turnId
[chat.js] вҶҗ ACK/ready, chatState: awaiting_ack вҶ’ idle
